name: Chicken Okra Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the breast from a raw foul (chicken) and make a chicken broth with the remaining parts.
2. Dice the chicken breast into small pieces.
3. Place the diced chicken in a vessel with a chopped onion, chopped green pepper, and a small amount of butter.
4. Simmer until the onion is soft.
5. Add the chicken broth, 2 peeled tomatoes (or some canned tomatoes), salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Boil slowly for 30 minutes.
7. Add 1 pound of okra cut into pieces about 3/4 inch long and cook until the okra is tender.
8. Stir in 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce and a cup of boiled rice.
9. Serve with chopped parsley. If desired, add a slice of ham cut into small squares at the same time as the chicken breast.
